name: Scott Green's Golf Club
about: Scott Green's Golf Club is a year-round golf facility offering both an outdoor 9-hole course and indoor golf simulation. The centerpiece is a state-of-the-art HD Golf Simulator featuring the latest Apogee technology, utilizing ultra-high-speed cameras for accurate data tracking. They cater to a wide range of players, from beginners to serious golfers, with a family-friendly atmosphere and a focus on accessibility, including specialized junior programs and events. Pricing is straightforward, with hourly rates for the simulator and affordable outdoor 9-hole fees, with special online rates available.
why_golfers_like_it: High-accuracy Apogee simulator provides instant feedback on club and ball data
Affordable pricing, especially with online reservations for sim and outdoor play
Family-friendly and inclusive environment with specialized clinics for women and juniors
Year-round facility allowing play regardless of weather conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: Voice activated system using ultra-high-speed cameras and impact vision algorithms

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for both indoor simulator play and outdoor golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service, nor does it specify a BYOB policy. It is best to contact the venue directly to inquire about bringing outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Scott Green's features a 9-hole outdoor course. The indoor simulator can be booked for an hour, which is enough time to play multiple 9 or 18-hole rounds depending on the game pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is highly kid-friendly. They offer junior golf clinics for ages 10-16, a junior tournament series, and market themselves as having a 'family-friendly atmosphere.'
